chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-249 of 2022 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on Misc. No.1217/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection No.18. 3. For orders on Misc. No.1218/2022 (Ex/A). 4. For orders on Misc. No.1219/2022 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 17.1.2022. Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Office objection to be complied with within seven days’ time. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-5. 4-5. Learned counsel states that on identical issue a petition bearing C.P. No.D-20/2022 has been filed, wherein notices have been issued. He request that the same order may be passed in the instant petition. Learned counsel states that the petitioner intends to secure differential amount with the Nazir of this Court. Subject to securing the differential duties and taxes in terms of the bank guarantee by the petitioner, the consignment be released. On providing such security, the Nazir of this Court shall issue certificate(s) for its presentation before the concerned Collectorate for release of the consignment forthwith. Let notice be issued to the respondents as well as DAG for 01.2.2022. Office is directed to tag C.P. No.D-20/2022 along with the instant petition. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
